task_description: Implement the Appointment Service module end to end for the TraPac Terminal Appointment System. Includes database schema, backend API with all 7 endpoints, business logic (status lifecycle, cancellation rules, dual appointments, bulk creation), audit trail, frontend pages (list, create, detail/edit, cancel, bulk), and comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: Backend: TypeScript compilation passes, 53 tests pass. Frontend: Next.js build succeeds (7 pages), 17 component tests pass. Two review cycles completed. All critical issues resolved: state machine enforces forward-only transitions (CANCELLED only via dedicated endpoint), frontend-backend validation aligned, terminal IDs consistent across forms, external service return values checked, appointment number collision handled with retry.
